postToolUse.powershell: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $j = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($j.toolName -eq 'powershell' -and $j.toolArgs -match 'git push') { Add-Content -Path 'C:/Users/abhmohanty/.copilot/hooks/push-audit.log' -Value \"$(Get-Date -Format o) | $($j.toolArgs)\" }"
